Acid Splash.description: Hurls a bubble of acid that can damage one or two creatures clustered close together.

Blade Ward.description: Traces a protective ward in the air, granting you temporary resistance against physical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

Chill Touch.description: Assaults a target with a ghostly, skeletal hand that inflicts necrotic damage and prevents them from regaining hit points until your next turn.

Dancing Lights.description: Creates up to four lantern-sized lights that hover in the air and can be moved dynamically as a bonus action.

Druidcraft.description: Manipulates nature to create minor sensory effects, forecast weather conditions, rapidly bloom flowers, or snuff out small fires.

Eldritch Blast.description: Fires a concentrated beam of crackling energy toward a creature within range, dealing force damage on a hit.

Fire Bolt.description: Hurls a flame mote at an enemy or object within range, dealing fire damage and igniting flammable, unattended targets.

Guidance.description: Touches a willing creature to grant them a minor divine favor, adding a d4 bonus to an ability check of their choice.

Light.description: Touches an object to make it glow brightly, shedding light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

Mage Hand.description: Summons an invisible or spectral floating hand that can manipulate objects, open unlocked doors, or stow items up to 30 feet away.

Mending.description: Repairs a single break, tear, or rupture in an object you touch, restoring its structural integrity completely.

Message.description: Points toward a creature within range to whisper a discrete message that only they can hear and safely reply to in absolute secret.

Minor Illusion.description: Creates a minor localized sound or a static visual image of an object within range that lasts for the duration.

Poison Spray.description: Projects a brief puff of highly toxic gas from your open palm, dealing poison damage to a nearby creature.

Prestidigitation.description: Performs minor magical tricks, such as instantly cleaning, soiling, warming, chilling, flavoring, or marking an object.

Produce Flame.description: Conjures a flickering flame inside your palm that sheds light and can be thrown at a target as a ranged spell attack.

Ray of Frost.description: Launches a frigid beam of blue-white light at a creature, dealing cold damage and reducing its movement speed.

Resistance.description: Touches a willing target to grant them a defensive ward, allowing them to add a d4 to a saving throw of their choice.

Sacred Flame.description: Calls down bright celestial radiance upon an enemy, inflicting radiant damage and bypassing any benefits of cover.

Shillelagh.description: Imbues a club or quarterstaff with nature's power, allowing you to use your spellcasting ability modifier for melee attack and damage rolls.

Shocking Grasp.description: Channels electricity through your hand to shock a creature you touch, dealing lightning damage and disabling their ability to take reactions.

Spare the Dying.description: Touches a living creature currently sitting at 0 hit points to instantly stabilize them and prevent further death saves.

Thaumaturgy.description: Manifests a minor wonder or sign of supernatural power, such as booming your voice, trembling the ground, or altering flame colors.

True Strike.description: Extends your hand to glean immediate magical insight into a target's defenses, enhancing the accuracy of your next strike.

Vicious Mockery.description: Unleashes an insult laced with subtle enchantments, forcing a creature to take psychic damage and suffer disadvantage on its next attack.

Alarm.description: Sets a defensive magical boundary that alerts you with an audible or mental chime whenever a creature enters the warded zone.

Animal Friendship.description: Convinces a beast that you mean it no harm, leaving it completely charmed by your presence for the duration.

Armor of Agathys.description: Surrounds yourself with a protective frost layer that grants temporary hit points and deals cold damage back to melee attackers.

Arms of Hadar.description: Calls forth dark tendrils of cosmic energy that erupt outward from you, damaging nearby targets and preventing them from taking reactions.

Bane.description: Curses up to three targets, forcing them to subtract a d4 from all of their attack rolls and saving throws.

Bless.description: Blesses up to three targets, allowing them to add a d4 bonus to all of their attack rolls and saving throws.

Burning Hands.description: A thin sheet of fire shoots from your outstretched fingertips, scorching all creatures inside a 15-foot cone.

Charm Person.description: Attempts to charm a humanoid creature, causing them to view you as a trusted and friendly acquaintance.

Chromatic Orb.description: Hurls a sphere of pure energy of a chosen type—acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder—unerringly at a target.

Color Spray.description: A vivid array of flashing, brilliant colored lights springs from your hands, blinding creatures within its area of effect.

Command.description: Speaks a single-word command to a creature, forcing them to follow your directive on their turn if they fail a saving throw.

Compelled Duel.description: Attempts to compel an enemy into single combat, imposing disadvantage on its attacks against any target other than you.

Comprehend Languages.description: Grants you a literal translation of any spoken language you actively hear or any written text you touch.

Create or Destroy Water.description: Generates clean, drinkable water in an open container or area, or alternatively, entirely destroys a volume of water or open fog.

Cure Wounds.description: Channels positive energy into a creature you touch, restoring hit points based on your spellcasting ability modifier.

Detect Evil and Good.description: Senses the presence and location of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead within your immediate vicinity.

Detect Magic.description: Senses magical presence within 30 feet and reveals a glowing aura around visible objects or creatures carrying active magic.

Detect Poison and Disease.description: Senses the precise location, presence, and category of poisons, venomous creatures, or infectious diseases within 30 feet.

Disguise Self.description: Alters your physical appearance, garments, and weapon presentation using an illusory guise to look like someone else.

Divine Favor.description: Empowers your martial weapon strikes with divine might, causing them to deal extra radiant damage upon a successful hit.

Entangle.description: Causes grasping weeds and vines to burst from the floor, turning a square into difficult terrain and restraining targets.

Expeditious Retreat.description: Allows you to take the Dash action as a bonus action on the turn you cast it and on subsequent turns for the duration.

Faerie Fire.description: Outlines creatures and objects in a 20-foot cube with glowing light, granting advantage on attacks against affected targets.

False Life.description: Bolsters your life essence with a minor necromantic matrix, granting you a pool of temporary hit points.

Feather Fall.description: Slows the descent rate of up to five falling creatures within range, completely eliminating impact damage upon landing.

Find Familiar.description: Summons a loyal spirit taking an animal form of your choice, serving as an assistant and scout that can deliver touch spells.

Floating Disk.description: Creates a circular, horizontal plane of force that follows you closely and supports heavy equipment or weight loads.

Fog Cloud.description: Conjures a dense, 20-foot-radius sphere of fog that completely obscures vision and blocks direct sightlines.

Goodberry.description: Conjures ten magical berries that each restore 1 hit point and provide full daily nourishment to a creature.

Grease.description: Coats a 10-foot square of ground in slippery grease, forcing creatures within the area to pass a save or fall prone.

Guiding Bolt.description: Fires a flashing beam of radiant light at an enemy, inflicting radiant damage and giving advantage to the next attack against them.

Healing Word.description: A rapid vocalization of healing magic that restores hit points to a target within sight as a flexible bonus action.

Hellish Rebuke.description: Points a vengeful finger at a creature that just damaged you, swallowing them in an abrupt explosion of hellish flames.

Heroism.description: Imbues a friendly creature with bravery, making them completely immune to being frightened and supplying temporary hit points each turn.

Hideous Laughter.description: Sends a target into uncontrollable fits of laughter, leaving them prone, incapacitated, and unable to move.

Hunter\u2019s Mark.description: Designates an enemy as your primary quarry, causing your weapon attacks to deal extra damage to them.

Identify.description: Examines an item or magical entity to learn its exact properties, attunement stipulations, and any active enchantments.

Illusory Script.description: Inscribes a message that looks normal or completely different to ordinary viewers, but reveals its true meaning to specific readers.

Inflict Wounds.description: Delivers a melee spell strike that pumps raw necrotic decay into a target, inflicting massive necrotic damage.

Jump.description: Touches a creature to safely triple their baseline jump distance for the duration of the spell.

Longstrider.description: Touches a creature to increase its baseline walking speed by 10 feet until the spell duration runs out.

Mage Armor.description: Protects an unarmored target with a shimmering, protective field of force that raises their base Armor Class.

Magic Missile.description: Launches three glowing darts of magical force that automatically hit their targets without fail, dealing force damage.

Protection from Evil and Good.description: Wards a creature against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, giving those creatures disadvantage on attacks against the target.

Purify Food and Drink.description: Cleanses all nonmagical food and beverages within a small radius, leaving them entirely free of contaminants, poison, and rot.

Sanctuary.description: Wards a creature; any enemy attempting to directly attack them must pass a Wisdom save or pick a brand-new target.

Shield.description: An invisible field of protective force intercepts an incoming attack, raising your AC by 5 and blocking magic missile.

Shield of Faith.description: Surrounds a creature with a shimmering field of divine faith, conferring a +2 bonus to their Armor Class.

Silent Image.description: Creates a purely visual illusion of an object, creature, or phenomenon that can be manually moved around within range.

Sleep.description: Sends a cluster of nearby creatures into a deep magical slumber based on a rolled pool of cumulative hit points.

Speak with Animals.description: Grants you the supernatural ability to comprehend and verbally communicate with beasts for the duration.

Thunderwave.description: A wave of thunderous pressure sweeps outward from you, dealing thunder damage and forcefully knocking back unsecured objects and creatures.

Unseen Servant.description: Creates an invisible, mindless, and shapeless magical presence that performs basic tasks and errands at your command.

Silvery Barbs.description: A specialized reaction that can negate an enemy's success and grant an ally advantage on their next roll.
